title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: MoonShot AI released Kimi K2.6, a large language model optimized for coding tasks and long-running agent workflows. The model represents maturation in Chinese AI labs' capabilities, with improvements over the K2.5 version particularly for code generation and agent swarm applications.
